DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FREDENBURG, MICHAEL DBA SPRINGLING INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINGLINE INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
